prep.summary: Your last discussion with Praveena on June 15 focused on critical resource constraints—specifically managing Rebecca's departure transition, securing data architecture support, and coaching James on stakeholder interactions. You also addressed technical hurdles around 2-Way SMS claims risk—a lingering issue requiring security clearance—and agreed to map out Praveena's career strategy. Today you must align on assigning Amit to the overarching business health scorecard—an initiative tied directly to the enterprise cockpit architecture.
tasks: Finalize the candidate requirements and transition plan for Rebecca's backfill.
Confirm the assignment of Amit to the overarching business health scorecard.
Secure a definitive stance from the security and privacy teams regarding 2-Way SMS claims risk.
Schedule a dedicated career strategy session with Praveena to discuss her professional growth.
prep.title: Sync With Mark

events.summary: Monthly: Architecture Sync with Deepak Srinivasan

prep.summary: You must navigate several pressing architecture shifts — including migrating to direct Kafka-to-Celonis pipelines for real-time process observability, securing data ownership on Iceberg/AWS for the CMT telematics POC, and modernizing legacy Life Company infrastructure. For cascading messages — ensure the architecture team immediately reviews and validates the 'Time Recommendation' details in the TPM dashboard for all 'Migrate' or 'Eliminate' applications to prevent flawed funding decisions. You must also prepare the team for upcoming governance reviews regarding HiMarley security hurdles and the newly introduced 'Platform Mindset' metrics.
tasks: Validate the 'Time Recommendation' details in the TPM dashboard for all applications marked in 'Migrate' or 'Eliminate' status.
Draft the Enterprise Architecture position paper harmonizing Celonis, ScanAI, and the existing Beam/Snowflake infrastructure.
Resolve the security and compliance hurdles regarding PII/NPI sharing for the HiMarley voicemail and texting integration.
Evaluate the initial vector embedding data output from the CMT POC to determine its predictive value before further contract negotiations.
Establish the quarterly targets for the new 'Platform Mindset' metric to meet the impending leadership submission deadline.
prep.title: Bi-weekly: Tech BoD
